ExtraProperties.Name: ApplianceTC
ExtraProperties.Label: Terms and Conditions
ExtraProperties.Text:
This agreement certifies I meet the income requirements necessary to participate in San Diego Gas & Electric (SDG&E) ESA Whole Home Program. The ESA Whole Home Program offers NO COST WEATHERIZATION AND LIMITED APPLIANCE REPAIR services to high-usage income-qualified homeowners and renters. The Energy Savings Assistance Program also offers NO COST FURNACE REPAIR OR REPLACEMENT services to qualified homeowners.

Based on the information I have provided herein; I am hereby eligible to receive no-cost ESA Whole Home services. I understand I may cancel at any time prior to installation without penalty or obligation by calling the service provider’s phone number listed on the reverse side of this document. As the applicant, I hereby authorize Energy Savings Assistance Program representatives to examine all my employment, utility, and other records pertinent to this agreement and authorize the service provider listed on the reverse side of this document, and any subsequent contractors and inspectors, access to perform necessary Energy Savings Assistance Program services in my home. Additionally, I understand NO LIEN WILL BE PLACED AGAINST THIS PROPERTY and that SDG&E may share my information with other utilities, agents, or entities to enroll me in their assistance programs and facilitate assistance program management processes. This agreement may serve as authorization to participate in other assistance programs such as CARE, LIHEAP, or other energy efficiency programs managed by other utilities or utility suppliers.

If the property listed on the reverse side of this document is a rental property, as the owner of said property. I hereby grant my tenant (s) permission to have all program services installed as determined by the service provider and authorize ESA Whole Home representatives’ access to examine all records pertinent to this agreement. Further, I agree that any ESA Whole Home services provided to my tenants) will not be used as justification for increased rental rates for a period of one year after program services are completed. Additionally, I authorize the service provider listed on the reverse side of this document and its contractors and subcontractors, and any subsequent inspectors, access to my property to perform necessary ESA Whole Home services. Once installation has been completed. I/WE agree to contact the service provider for any and all issues arising from said installation and shall defend, indemnity and hold harmless SDG&E and its affiliates, and their officers and employees respectively, against any causes of action, liability, damages, demands or costs, for injury to or death of any and all persons whatsoever, and for any and all damages to property, in any manner arising from, or in connection with, the performance of the services hereunder, except for those damages caused due to sole negligence or willful misconduct of SDG&E or their affiliates, or their officers, or employees. Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, none of such parties shall be liable hereunder for any type of damages, including damages for loss of use, regardless of the form of action, whether in contract, indemnity, warranty, strict liability, or tort, include negligence of any kind.

By signing this document, I certify that this agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties and no other agreement, statement or promise made by any party, which is not contained in this agreement shall be binding or valid. All services are subject to available funds and will be completed at no cost to the customer. Further, NO LIEN WILL BE PLACED AGAINST THIS PROPERTY.

I hereby waive any claim to state or federal tax credits, utility cash rebates, or any other utility incentives with respect to any ESA Whole Home services installed on the premises referenced on this agreement.

I understand that SDG&E makes no representations regarding manufacturers, dealers, contractor, materials, or workmanship.

I ALSO UNDERSTAND THAT SDG&E MAKES NO WARRANTY WHETHER EXPRESSED OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR ANY PARTICULAR PURPOSE, USE OR APPLICATION OF THE PRODUCTS OR MEASURES.

SDG&E CARE ELIGIBILITY REQUIREMENTS (All Must Be Met):

  • The gas/electric bill is in your name.
  • No one else can claim you as a dependent on his/her income tax (other than your spouse).
  • Your total yearly household income (the income or aid received by all persons living in your home)-before deductions-is no more than the qualifying income level.
  • You reapply for CARE/FERA every time you move.
  • You renew your application for CARE/FERA every 2 years.
  • You verify your eligibility for CARE/FERA, if requested.
  • You notify the service provider within 30 days of any changes in your eligibility.

What counts as income?

Total household income is all revenues from all household members, from whatever sources derived, including but not limited to: wages, salaries, interest, dividends, spousal and child support payments, public assistance payments. Social Security and pensions. rental income, income from self-employment, and all employment- related non-cash income. Please be advised you may also quality for assistance from the Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP). For more information on LIHEAP, call 1-866-675-6623

I certify that I have read and that I understand and agree to the Customer Agreement information above and all given statements are true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

ExtraProperties.Label: I, the customer, have reviewed all of the information contained in this Installation Form. By signing below, I certify that I have read and that I understand and agree to the Terms and Conditions.
ExtraProperties.Name: CustomerDeclarationCheckbox
WarrantyInformation
ExtraProperties.Text:
Warranty Information:

  1. The appliance/equipment is covered by a minimum one-year parts and labor warranty beginning from the date of installation.
  2. The Contractor(s) warrants the workmanship on the above installed Measure(s) for 90-days to one-year depending on the type of work performed. The workmanship warranties commence from date of installation.
  3. Customers may email warrantydesk@maromaes.com for specific warranty details as needed.
